subject: Mudsdale, a large powerful draft-horse-like creature with a heavy muscular build and thick hardened mud coating on its lower legs
description: Mudsdale is depicted in a wide mid-shot, its large body commanding the frame. The creature has the build of a heavy draft horse, with a broad chest and thick legs. The lower legs are coated in what appears to be compacted, hardened mud, giving them an armored appearance consistent with its defensive ability. The setting appears to be rocky, open terrain. The creature's posture is stable and grounded, projecting endurance and solidity rather than aggression. The overall mood is one of stoic strength.
foreground: Mudsdale standing with mud-armored lower legs prominent
